sources.title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
claims_supported: Cursor in talks to raise $2B at $50B pre-money valuation
Round led by Andreessen Horowitz and Thrive Capital with Nvidia as strategic co-investor
Cursor hit $2B ARR in February 2026
Cursor forecasts $6B ARR by end of 2026
70% of Fortune 1000 companies in Cursor's customer base

sources.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
claims_supported: Cursor $2B funding round at $50B valuation confirmed
Battery Ventures as potential new investor
Cursor's fastest B2B SaaS scaling on record

sources.publisher: Uvik Software / Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2025
sources.title: AI Coding Assistant Stats 2026: 84% Adoption, 29% Trust
claims_supported: 84% of developers use or plan to use AI coding tools
Only 29% trust AI coding output — down from 40% in 2024
51% of professionals use AI coding tools daily
Burnout risk dropped 17% for AI coding tool users
70% of engineers use 2-4 AI coding tools simultaneously

sources.title: AI Coding Market Funding Trends (2022-2026)
claims_supported: AI coding market raised $9.4B in equity funding between 2022 and 2025
Growing from $22.25M in deals in 2022 to $7.4B annual investment by 2025

sources.title: AI Code Assistant Market | Global Market Analysis Report - 2035
claims_supported: AI code assistant market valued at $5.5B in 2024
Projected to reach $47.3B by 2034 at a 24% CAGR

sources.title: OpenAI's $3 billion deal with AI coding startup Windsurf collapses, as Google swoops in for licensing deal
claims_supported: OpenAI's $3B Windsurf acquisition exclusivity expired and deal collapsed
Google secured a separate technology licensing deal for Windsurf's underlying models
Cognition AI subsequently acquired Windsurf for approximately $250M
$82M ARR at acquisition with enterprise revenue doubling QoQ

sources.title: AI Coding Assistant Market Share 2026: Cursor, Copilot, Claude
claims_supported: AI coding assistant market hit $12.8B in 2026
GitHub Copilot holds ~37% market share with 4.7M paid subscribers
90% Fortune 100 adoption for GitHub Copilot
Cursor leads on revenue among category-native AI dev tools
Claude Code ranked #1 for developer satisfaction (JetBrains April 2026)

sources.title: AI Coding Statistics — Adoption, Productivity & Market Metrics
claims_supported: AI-assisted developers complete 21% more tasks than non-AI counterparts
AI-assisted developers create 98% more pull requests per person
GitHub Copilot saves users an estimated 55% of time on specific coding tasks
Developers spend 25-35% of their day in AI-assisted coding loops

sources.title: Mind the gap: Closing the AI trust gap for developers
claims_supported: Usage and trust are moving in opposite directions among developers
Trust in AI coding output dropped from 40% (2024) to 29% (2025)
Developer adoption remains at 84% despite the trust decline

sources.title: AI Makes Securing Copyright Protection for Software Code Tricky
claims_supported: US Copyright Office will not register works produced by AI without human creative input
EU AI Act requires GPAI model providers to publish training data summaries
EU AI Act training data enforcement begins August 2026 with fines up to 3% global revenue
AI-generated code may carry embedded open-source license obligations (GPL contamination)

sources.title: Windsurf Acquisition and the 2026 AI IDE Market Shakeup — What Developers Need to Know About the Agent-First Era
claims_supported: Windsurf ranked #1 in LogRocket AI Dev Tool Power Rankings February 2026
Post-acquisition analysis of Cognition AI + Windsurf combined offering
Agent-first IDE paradigm replacing plugin-based autocomplete model

sources.title: Cursor in talks to raise $2B at $50B valuation after hitting $2B ARR in three years
claims_supported: Cursor hit $100M ARR (January 2025), $500M ARR (June 2025), $1B ARR (November 2025), $2B ARR (February 2026)
Fastest B2B SaaS progression from $1M to $1B ARR in history
1M+ paying customers
Nearly 70% of Fortune 1000 in customer base

verification_notes: Market size ($12.8B in 2026) sourced from IdeaPlan.io market report — methodology not independently verified; Future Market Insights estimates $5.5B in 2024 suggesting higher 2026 figure is plausible given 24% CAGR but may include adjacent developer tooling segments

growth_5y and growth_3m figures marked as (est.) — 5Y baseline ($200M–500M in 2021) is approximate as the category barely existed; 3M estimate based on Cursor as leading indicator, not full-market measurement

Market share percentages (GitHub 37%, Cursor 25%, Amazon Q 12%, Tabnine 8%, JetBrains 7%) are analyst estimates with significant methodology variation across sources — treat as directional, not precise
Windsurf acquisition price ($250M by Cognition AI) based on Fortune/TechCrunch reporting — final terms not publicly confirmed as of research date
EU AI Act enforcement date (August 2026) for GPAI training data transparency requirements — verified via multiple legal sources (Carlton Fields, JDSupra)
